# Generated Code — Developer README

## Architecture

```
gen/
├── estate/
│   └── v1/
│       └── estate_pb.ts   # Protobuf/ConnectRPC TypeScript types
└── README.md              # This file
```

## Purpose

Auto-generated TypeScript types from `proto/estate/v1/estate.proto`. Generated by `protoc-gen-es v2.2.3` (Buf ecosystem).

**Do not edit these files by hand.** Regenerate with:

```bash
npx buf generate proto
```

## What's Generated

### Messages (Request/Response pairs)
| RPC | Request | Response |
|-----|---------|----------|
| `RegisterEstate` | `RegisterEstateRequest` | `RegisterEstateResponse` |
| `ListEstates` | `ListEstatesRequest` | `ListEstatesResponse` |
| `GetEstateMetadata` | `GetEstateMetadataRequest` | `GetEstateMetadataResponse` |
| `ListAssets` / `AddAsset` | `ListAssetsRequest` / `AddAssetRequest` | `ListAssetsResponse` / `AddAssetResponse` |
| `ListBeneficiaries` / `AddBeneficiary` | — | — |
| `ListVaultDocuments` / `GenerateUploadUrl` | — | — |
| `ListMemoirs` / `UploadMemoir` | — | — |
| `GetObituary` / `SaveObituary` | — | — |
| `GetAIInsight` | — | — |
| `GetGovernanceSettings` | — | — |
| `ListNotifications` | — | — |

### Enums
- `AuthorityMode`: `UNSPECIFIED`, `OWNER`, `INCAPACITY`, `DEATH`

### Domain Types
- `EstateSummary` — id, name, role
- `Asset` — name, type, value, status
- `Beneficiary` — id, name, relation, share, status, email
- `VaultDocument` — name, date, size, category
- `Memoir` — id, title, type, url, date_added, visibility
- `GovernanceSettings` — mfa, biometric, email alerts, recovery key, status reports
- `Notification` — title, time, type, desc

## Go Counterpart
The Go API has its own generated code at `api/internal/gen/estate/v1/`. Both are generated from the same `.proto` source.

## Dependencies
- `@bufbuild/protobuf` — runtime for generated code
- `@bufbuild/protobuf/wkt` — well-known types (Timestamp)
